author: muhtasham
name: Classical Doc-Copy 16.3M LZMA Artifact
blurb: Non-record classical submission: a 16.3M-token artifact using a document-local copy expert over discounted hashed 4-gram backoff. Packed 10-bit n-gram token storage plus lzma state compression keeps the rebuilt artifact at 15,638,788 bytes, code at 66,221 bytes, and full validation reaches 1.81114207 bpb in 280.19s on the official FineWeb split.
